channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Energy stocks lead 2026 gains, but Iran war may erode rally
ServiceNow's stock sinks, taking software sector down with it
U.S. inflation picture hasn't been this bleak in nearly four years
Stocks off session lows in final hour, but tech-heavy Nasdaq leads declines
Senate advances $70 billion funding plan for ICE and Border Patrol
item.description: Republicans vote to advance immigration enforcement funding bill.

item.title: Trump's lack of focus on economy spooks Republicans as 2026 election looms
item.description: President posts about Iran, pope, and ballroom instead of rising gas prices.

item.title: Investors worried about private credit, but money still flows into ETFs
DOJ watchdog investigating handling of Jeffrey Epstein files
item.description: Congress passed Epstein files law after Bondi reneged on release promise.

item.title: White House warns of 'industrial-scale' Chinese efforts to steal U.S. AI tech
item.description: Government accuses China of targeting American AI intellectual property.

item.title: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
item.description: Tensions with Iran escalate as oil tanker traffic choked off since war began.
